source: Choice Of Plausible Alternatives (COPA) — Commonsense Causal Reasoning (BSD license)
citation: Roemmele, M., Bejan, C.A., and Gordon, A.S. (2011). Choice of Plausible Alternatives: An Evaluation of Commonsense Causal Reasoning. AAAI Spring Symposium.
